WKSH.settings.install.name: Module content
WKSH.settings.install.label: Install / reinstall content
WKSH.settings.install.hint: Creates the folder and the 3 crafting macros in this world (in the world's language).
WKSH.install.title: Crafting Workshops — Setup
WKSH.install.prompt: Install the crafting macros (lightsaber, potions & talismans, tuning) into this world?
WKSH.install.promptHint: You can reinstall at any time from Configure Settings → Sabacc & Workshops.
WKSH.install.gmOnly: Only the GM can install the content.
WKSH.common.assignCharacter: Assign yourself a character (right-click the actor → Assign) or select your token.
